selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next uncovered parent after the active ingest/promotion reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the work-surface export lineage into a smaller controller-usable packet without rereading raw sources or promoting work-local packaging into active law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active sibling once this export-lineage packet is narrowed.
Best direct work-surface follow-on after the first export-lineage batch.
Later active sibling after the remaining active `a2_state` live-state/index family is handled.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the wrapped export arc, scope oscillation, checksum-sidecar convention, and overlay-boundary drift needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: WRAPPER_AROUND_SERIAL_SENDSET_CLASSIFICATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the one-file wrapper as transport compression without erasing the underlying serial send model.

candidate_items.name: LEAN_RETURN_PACKET_WITH_EXPLICIT_OMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the outputs-only return useful while preserving its intentional omissions and lower authority relative to fuller environment surfaces.

candidate_items.name: MINIMAL_DELTA_DRIFT_PREVENTION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the deliberately small bridge-only delta as an intentful export class without pretending it settled export scope permanently.

candidate_items.name: BROAD_UPDATE_PACK_IS_SEPARATE_EXPORT_CLASS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the broad update pack as a distinct rebloat class rather than letting it silently replace the smaller export forms.

candidate_items.name: DETACHED_SIDECAR_HASH_IS_WEAKER_THAN_FILENAME_BOUND_LEDGER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the checksum-style contrast into one controller-usable auditability rule.

quarantined_items.name: WORK_OUT_EXPORTS_AS_ACTIVE_TRANSPORT_OR_SAVE_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The entire family lives under `work/` and remains export archaeology rather than active transport doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: BUNDLED_UPDATE_PACK_AS_DOWNSTREAM_APPLY_SUCCESS_OR_DIRECT_SOURCE_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves packaging scope and residue only, not successful downstream application or direct semantic processing of bundled payloads.

notes: This batch preserves the export lineage as spillover packaging archaeology rather than active bundle doctrine.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
